news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) disclosed that it will be represented at upcoming investor conferences. Specifically, they will be present at the Needham Technology, Media, & Consumer Virtual Conference on May 9 and May 12, 2025. Additionally, D-Wave will participate in the J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 13, 2025, in Boston, MA, with a scheduled presentation at 8:50 a.m. ET. The company is also set to attend the J.P. Morgan Virtual Quantum Conference scheduled for a later date.
news.headline: D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS) to attend Needham Investor Conference on May 9 & May 12, and JP Morgan Conference on May 13.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: FRGE) reported its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, a key provider of marketplace infrastructure, data services, and technology and investment solutions for the private market, announced impressive results. CEO Kelly Rodriques highlighted that Q1 marked their highest revenue quarter since going public, attributing this success primarily to enhanced marketplace revenue. Total revenue for the quarter reached $25.1 million.
news.headline: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. reported Q1 fiscal year 2025 results with revenue totaling $25.1 million, the best quarter as a public company.

news.summary: CPI Card Group Inc., based in Littleton, Colorado, has declared the acquisition of Arroweye Solutions, Inc. This business move is set to significantly impact the industry, with the details of the acquisition including important numbers yet to be disclosed to the public, as announced by the company via a press release without mentioning the source.
news.headline: CPI Card Group Inc. acquires Arroweye Solutions, Inc. in Littleton, Colo. deal.

news.summary: Based in Vancouver, Canada, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX:WELL, OTCQX:WHTCF) is a digital healthcare company striving to enhance health outcomes through technology for healthcare practitioners and patients worldwide. The company's subsidiary, WELLSTAR Technologies Corp., which is a prominent provider of interoperable technology solutions for healthcare providers in Canada, has introduced Nexus AI™. This new offering showcases advanced artificial intelligence capabilities, aiming to revolutionize the healthcare sector.
news.headline: WELLSTAR Technologies launches Nexus AI, a transformative AI platform for Canadian healthcare providers, subsidiary of WELL Health Technologies Corp. WellSTAR is Canada’s top provider of interoperable technology solutions for healthcare providers.

news.summary: Selene, a company specializing in loan servicing, diligence, and title solutions, has appointed Jocelyn Martin-Leano as the new President of Selene Finance and Doug Whittemore as the Chief Strategy and Growth Officer across all Selene Holdings’ business lines. These appointments are effective immediately. Martin-Leano will be responsible for managing all operations at Selene Finance, while Whittemore's focus will be on driving product development, fostering company growth, and managing client and industry relationships.
news.headline: Jocelyn Martin-Leano appointed as President of Selene Finance and Doug Whittemore as Chief Strategy and Growth Officer to drive company growth in Dallas.

news.summary: In MP Menashe, Israel, Caesarstone Ltd. (NASDAQ: CSTE), a prominent developer and producer of top-notch engineered surfaces, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company's Chief Executive Officer, Yos Shiran, remarked on the modest progress made in this quarter amidst a difficult market setting. Despite challenges, such as the complex global scenario, Caesarstone exhibited some positive improvements.
news.headline: Caesarstone Ltd. (CSTE) releases Q1 2025 financial results, showing modest improvement, CEO comments on challenging market.

news.summary: Avista Corp. revealed its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2025 in Spokane, Washington. As per the NYSE under the symbol AVA, the company announced that the net income and earnings per diluted share have been disclosed in the table below for a comparative analysis with the first quarter of 2024. The data is presented in million dollars, except for the per-share figures.
news.headline: Avista Corp. reports Q1 2025 financial results, comparing to Q1 2024. Net income & EPS figures detailed.

news.summary: Y-mAbs Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that naxitamab-gqgk (DANYELZA®) has been endorsed by the National Comprehensive Cancer Network ® (NCCN) Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology as a NCCN Category 2A treatment for high-risk neuroblastoma. Y-mAbs is a leading biopharmaceutical company specialized in novel radioimmunotherapy and antibody-based cancer treatments. This recommendation solidifies DANYELZA®'s position in the market as a significant option for patients with high-risk neuroblastoma.
news.headline: Y-mAbs' DANYELZA now recommended by NCCN for high-risk neuroblastoma, as a Category 2A treatment option.
Celcuity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELC) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 14, 2025, with webcast at 4:30pm ET.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on May 7, 2025, The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT), which operates, manages, and franchises chiropractic clinics nationwide, revealed that its President and CEO, Sanjiv Razdan, and CFO, Jake Singleton, will be attending various forthcoming conferences.
news.headline: The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT) to attend investor conferences with President & CEO Sanjiv Razdan and CFO Jake Singleton.

BTC ETFs saw a positive flow of +$426mn, while ETH ETFs saw $0mn. Concerns over US legislation impacted the market, postponing Florida's BTC reserve bills. news.summary: Garmin revealed on May 7, 2025, that its acclaimed Autoland system received certification for the latest SR Series model, the SR Series G7+. The inclusion of the Cirrus Safe Return™ Emergency Autoland system in the new SR20, SR22, and SR22T aircraft represents a significant milestone, being the first of its kind in the series.
news.headline: Garmin introduces Autoland in Cirrus SR Series G7+, making it the first piston aircraft with Safe Return; certified for SR20, SR22, SR22T.

news.summary: The company reported a total revenue of $24.2 million, showing a 10% increase from the previous year. In the quarter, they finalized 11 license agreements, which consisted of securing a Wi-Fi 7 deal with a key connectivity client, providing edge AI NPU for automotive ADAS, and supplying spatial audio software for wireless headsets to a prominent PC OEM. This positive performance powered the company's growth and showcased its strong market presence.
news.headline: Ceva, Inc. reports Q1 2025 revenue of $24.2 million, up 10% y-o-y. 11 license agreements signed, including deals in Wi-Fi 7, edge AI NPU, and spatial audio software.

news.summary: Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. disclosed its operating results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025, in Naples, Florida. The company, listed as BBGI on Nasdaq, reported its performance as a multi-platform media entity. Further details can be accessed through the information posted by the Company.
news.headline: Beasley Broadcast Group reports Q1 revenue of $48.9 million.

news.summary: Taking over from the current CEO Eduard Mirzoian, he will lead as the new CEO of Restorerz Emergency Services. Eduard Mirzoian will shift his focus towards utilizing technology to address challenges within the restoration and home service sectors. This development was announced in Los Angeles on May 7, 2025. Restorerz Emergency Services is known for its cutting-edge approach in the emergency restoration field.
news.headline: Restorerz Emergency Services appoints Edgar Mirzoian as new CEO, replacing Eduard Mirzoian. Eduard to focus on tech development.

news.summary: Vernon Hills-based CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) reported its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, with net sales totaling $5.2 billion, representing a 6.7% increase from the same period in 2024 when net sales were $4.9 billion. Gross profit for Q1 2025 stood at $1.1 billion compared to $1.1 billion in Q1 2024, reflecting a 5.5% increase. The gross profit margin was 21.6% for Q1 2025 and 21.8% for Q1 2024. Operating income for the first quarter of 2025 was $361.4 million, showing a 10.2% increase from $328 million in the first quarter of 2024. The operating income margin was 7.0% in Q1 2025 and 6.7% in Q1 2024. CDW Corporation reported a non-GAAP operating income of $444 million in Q1 2025, a 10% increase from $403.5 million in the same period in 2024. The non-GAAP operating income margin was 8.5%.
news.headline: CDW reports Q1 2025 earnings: Net sales $5.2B, 6.7% increase; gross profit $1.1B, 5.5% increase; operating income $361.4M, 10.2% increase.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLMN) announced their Q1 2025 results, comparing them to Q1 2024. CEO Mike Spanos stated, “We are focused on streamlining operations and enhancing the guest experience while also working to revitalize Outback and boost revenue and profit. Despite challenges in the macro environment, we are making strides towards our goals.”
news.headline: Bloomin’ Brands (Nasdaq: BLMN) reported Q1 2025 financial results vs. Q1 2024. CEO highlights progress and growth strategy.

news.summary: In Elgin, Illinois, The Middleby Corporation (NASDAQ: MIDD), a prominent global manufacturer of equipment for commercial foodservice, food processing, and residential kitchen industries, disclosed its first-quarter 2025 net earnings. The company also revealed an increase in its share repurchase initiative, intending to utilize most of its free cash flow for buying back shares. This decision comes after Middleby's announcement in February 2025 to split its operations.
news.headline: Middleby Corp (NASDAQ: MIDD) reports Q1 2025 results. Board increases share buyback to 21% of equity, focusing on buyback of shares.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading modern card issuing platform globally, has revealed a significant partnership with Perpay. The collaboration aims to introduce the Perpay Credit Card (issued by Celtic Bank), an unsecured credit card tailored to assist individuals in establishing or enhancing their credit scores through automated paycheck deductions. This decision signifies a transition for Perpay towards leveraging the advanced credit card platform offered by Marqeta, emphasizing the enhancement of credit card services for their clientele.
news.headline: Marqeta, Inc to power Perpay Credit Card for building credit, Payments automated from paycheck issued by Celtic Bank.

news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN), the umbrella company of Applebee’s Neighborhood Grill & Bar®, IHOP®, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop® eateries, shared their financial outcomes for Q1 of fiscal year 2025. CEO John Peyton expressed confidence in the company's resilience during these challenging times and noted a consistent uptick in sales, footfall, and the expansion plans starting from the latter part of the quarter.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN) reports Q1 2025 results showing steady improvement in sales and traffic.

news.summary: Calgary, Alberta-based TransAlta Corporation (TransAlta) disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, traded on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: TA) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: TAC), released this information on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: TransAlta reports Q1 2025 results, reaffirms annual guidance. (TSX: TA) (NYSE: TAC) - May 07, 2025.

news.summary: The traditional perception of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) as a passive store of value is rapidly evolving as it transitions to become a yield-generating financial asset. Brendon Sedo, an initial contributor to Core Chain and leader of its investment division, Core Ventures, explained that institutions are seeking more than just holding Bitcoin and are focusing on generating yield. Sedo highlighted that the next frontier is to make Bitcoin a productive asset that provides income without the need for custodians or sacrificing decentralization. This shift is facilitated through Core's Timelock Plus feature, which allows BTC holders to earn approximately 4–6% yield organically without the requirement to wrap their coins. This innovative mechanism eliminates the need for trust in custodians or bridges and revolutionizes the role of Bitcoin in the financial landscape.
news.headline: Bitcoin's role evolving from digital gold to yield-generating asset, offering 4-6% yield through Core DAO's Timelock Plus mechanism. Institutions shifting towards productive assets.

news.summary: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) based in Brentwood, Tenn., has released financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company demonstrated advancement towards achieving its Sum of the Parts goals and enhancing overall profitability, as stated by Avigal Soreq, President and CEO. Despite challenging market conditions, Delek US remains optimistic about its progress, particularly with its EOP. The company is focused on growth and efficiency in the face of current industry challenges.
news.headline: Delek US Holdings reports first quarter 2025 results, showing progress despite market challenges. President & CEO is optimistic.

news.summary: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) reported its financial performance for Q1 2025. The company emphasized a positive start to the year, solidifying its status as a leading midstream provider in the Permian basin. Offering a compelling mix of yield and growth in the midstream industry, Delek Logistics is positioned for long-term growth, benefiting from strategic advantages in the Midland and Delaware basins. This marks their 49th consecutive quarter of success.
news.headline: Delek Logistics (NYSE: DKL) reports record first quarter 2025 results, highlighting strong growth in Permian basin.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Perth, Australia, Hot Chili Limited (ASX: HCH) (TSXV: HCH) (OTCQX: HHLKF) welcomed two accomplished mining executives to their Board and executive management team. The company expressed satisfaction with the appointments.
news.headline: Hot Chili Limited appoints new Chair and Project Director, enhancing mine build capabilities.

news.summary: In an effort to combat the acute shortage of physicians, Israel's largest medical school is set to expand its capacity by 25%. This initiative not only aims to address the scarcity of healthcare professionals but also to enhance accessibility to medical education. The expansion includes the construction of a new dormitory to accommodate more students and the provision of scholarships to support aspiring medical professionals. Furthermore, the project will contribute to advancing medical research through the establishment of new laboratory facilities and the enlargement of the faculty. This development in Tel Aviv, Israel, is expected to make a significant impact by increasing the school's capacity by a quarter, improving access to medical education, and boosting opportunities for medical research.
news.headline: Tel Aviv University receives $125M gift to boost medical school capacity by 25%, improve education access, research.

news.summary: ODAIA, a company based in Boston, has recently unveiled a new product in the omnichannel marketing orchestration sector on May 7, 2025. This offering is designed to tailor campaigns for each healthcare provider (HCP) by leveraging predictive data on their prescribing habits, moving away from conventional personas. This innovative solution aims to revolutionize pharma marketing by providing personalized experiences for each HCP.
news.headline: ODAIA unveils AI-driven marketing orchestration for pharma industry, tailoring individual campaigns based on predictive insights.

news.summary: The creation of a market leader in Experience Intelligence ROI has been solidified with recent acquisitions. On May 7, 2025, Atombit, a pioneer in Experience Intelligence, revealed a notable advancement in its expansion by securing investment from Palatine Private Equity. Alongside this investment, Atombit has also concluded acquisitions, further cementing its position in the market. The development marks a significant step forward for the company, consolidating its presence and reach.
news.headline: Atombit secures backing from Palatine Private Equity, acquiring 3 companies to accelerate growth as Experience Intelligence market leader.

news.summary: Critical infrastructure companies around the globe can enhance their security measures by utilizing the top AI-powered security solution. This solution operates on the latest AI processing power. On May 7, 2025, in San Francisco, Nozomi Networks, a leading company in this field, made this announcement.
news.headline: Nozomi Networks integrates NVIDIA BlueField DPUs for advanced AI security in critical infrastructure worldwide. #SANFRANCISCO

news.summary: The latest clinical research reveals that Nutroxsun®, a natural beauty supplement, enhances collagen integrity and promotes skin radiance when exposed to photo-induced oxidative stress. On May 7, 2025, in MADRID, Monteloeder, SL, a subsidiary of SUANNUTRA SA, shared encouraging findings from their study. These results highlight the effectiveness of Nutroxsun® in improving skin health and combating the effects of oxidative stress on collagen.
news.headline: Clinical study reveals Monteloeder's Nutroxsun® composition maintains youthful skin under UV exposure, showing support for collagen integrity and skin radiance.

news.summary: PAQ Therapeutics, a biotechnology company based in Burlington, Massachusetts, recently announced an increase in their leadership team to enhance their clinical development strategy. This move aims to further advance the company's pipeline of potent and selective KRAS degraders. The expansion comes as part of their efforts to develop best- and first-in-class treatments. The announcement was made on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: PAQ Therapeutics names new CMO and additions to advisory board to enhance clinical strategy and pipeline.

news.summary: FOLSOM, Calif., May 7, 2025 - The latest venue of the top assisted stretching franchise has opened under local leadership. Stretch Zone, well-known for its practitioner-assisted stretching services, has introduced its newest location in the area. The franchise is recognized for its unique tables and patented strapping system.
news.headline: Stretch Zone opens new location in Folsom, CA under local leadership. Premier assisted stretching franchise with proprietary tables and patented strapping system. (Character count: 140)

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 7, 2025, Omnira Software has successfully acquired Adept Solutions, a top provider of advanced production accounting services tailored for the oil and gas sector. Adept Solutions is recognized for delivering top-notch hydrocarbon accounting solutions within the industry.
news.headline: Omnira Software acquires Adept Solutions, leader in production accounting, enhancing capabilities. May 7, 2025.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in cities of San Francisco and Boston, a press release was issued by Benchling, a prominent R&D platform in the biotech sector, revealing the expansion of their partnership with Moderna. The collaboration, which initially involved Benchling assisting Moderna's technical development groups, including analytical development, has now been scaled up. The enhanced collaboration signifies a deeper involvement of Benchling in facilitating Moderna's research and development efforts.
news.headline: Benchling and Moderna collaborate on AI-driven research in the biotech industry as of May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In 2024, every handler who tragically lost a police K-9 officer in the line of duty will be honored by MAGLITE at the upcoming National K-9 Memorial event in Ontario, California. The special remembrance will be presented in May 2025. MAGLITE has partnered with the National Police Dog Foundation for this tribute.
news.headline: MAGLITE enhances support for National Police Dog Foundation, honoring handlers of 2024 fallen K-9 officers.

news.summary: Today, on May 7, 2025, Zilia Inc., a leading medical technology company based in Quebec City, has successfully completed a bridge financing round. This initiative marks a significant milestone for the company, as they continue to innovate in utilizing the eye to assess overall health. The round of financing attracted new investors, a testament to Zilia's promising future. This achievement reflects the trust and confidence of the market in Zilia, highlighting the potential for growth in their groundbreaking approach.
news.headline: Zilia closes bridge round with existing and new investors like Linearis Ventures, focusing on eye health tech.

news.summary: Ramnik Kamo has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer (COO) at BearCom, a leading North American solutions integrator in voice, security, and data. With decades of cross-functional leadership experience in the technology industry, Kamo's appointment comes as a significant move for the company. The announcement was made in Dallas on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: BearCom appoints Ramnik Kamo as COO, with expertise in technology industry leadership, effective May 7, 2025.

news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled by Mastech Digital, Inc. (NYSE American: MHH), a prominent provider of Digital Transformation IT Services based in Pittsburgh, on May 7, 2025. The call is intended to review the results for the first quarter up to March 31, 2025. This event is particularly significant for investors and analysts interested in the company's performance, providing a platform to delve into key figures and strategies.
news.headline: Mastech Digital, Inc. (NYSE American: MHH) to discuss Q1 financial results on May 16, 2025.

news.summary: ATCO Ltd. announced first quarter 2025 adjusted earnings of $160 million ($1.43 per share), an increase of $12 million from the previous year. ATCO Structures secured contracts in Canada worth $50 million, in the US for $8 million, and in Australia for $7 million. Frontec won a $49 million contract to build a radar system in the Northwest Territories. Canadian Utilities invested $401 million in capital expenditures, with a focus on regulated utilities. ATCO EnPower saw $98 million in revenues in Q1 2025, a $7 million increase from 2024. ATCO declared a dividend of 50.45 cents per share. The Yellowhead Pipeline Project is on track for construction in 2026. CETO project construction will continue in 2025 to support renewable energy integration in Alberta. Live webcast scheduled for May 7, 2025, with company executives. Information available on the ATCO website.
news.headline: ATCO reports Q1 2025 earnings of $160 million, up $12 million from Q1 2024. Recent developments include awarded contracts totaling $50 million in Canada, $8 million in the US, and a $7 million contract in Australia. Canadian Utilities invested $401 million in Q1 2025, with projects including the Yellowhead Pipeline and the Central East Transfer-Out Project. ATCO declared a second quarter dividend of 50.45 cents per share. More details available on ATCO's website.

news.summary: The Comoto Family of Brands has announced an expansion to their safety campaign with the backing of Progressive Insurance® and Mips®. The initiative aims to raise awareness about wearable airbags and other advanced protection technology in Philadelphia. This move signifies a significant investment in promoting safety measures for motorcycle enthusiasts. The campaign is set to leverage the support of two major partners to underscore the importance of utilizing innovative safety features. The collaboration underscores the commitment to safety, with a focus on ensuring the well-being of individuals. Emphasizing the significance of protective gear, this partnership showcases a dedicated effort to drive awareness and foster a culture of safety within the community.
news.headline: "Airbags Save" campaign for motorcycle safety expands, supported by Comoto, Progressive Insurance, and Mips.

news.summary: In response to the soaring college tuition costs, the reputable home service organization is shedding light on alternative career avenues within the trades industry. Located in Sterling, Va., as of May 7, 2025, Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air marks Skilled Trades Day by showcasing opportunities outside of traditional academic routes.
news.headline: Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air in Sterling, VA, promotes Skilled Trades Day to offer alternative career paths amid rising college tuition - PRNewswire, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Shanghai, China, on May 07, 2025, GDS Holdings Limited revealed plans to release its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the Hong Kong market closes and before the U.S. market opens on May 20, 2025. GDS Holdings, a prominent player in high-performance data center development and operations in China, trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol GDS and on the HKEX under the ticker 9698. The upcoming financial report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts.
news.headline: GDS Holdings in China to report unaudited Q1 2025 financial results on May 20, 2025, after the Hong Kong market closes.
Spectral Medical secures up to $10M non-dilutive funding from Vantive.

news.summary: Canadian Utilities Limited reported first quarter 2025 adjusted earnings of $232 million ($0.85 per share), up $7 million from the previous year. Earnings attributable to equity owners were $236 million ($0.80 per share), down $6 million from 2024. The company invested $401 million in capital expenditures, with 91% in regulated utilities like ATCO Energy Systems and ATCO Australia. Projects include the Yellowhead Pipeline and Central East Transfer-Out Project. Revenue for ATCO EnPower increased to $98 million in Q1. A dividend of 45.77 cents per share was declared for Q2. Canadian Utilities has around 9,100 employees and assets totaling $24 billion. Additional financial details can be found on the company's website or SEDAR. A teleconference and webcast took place on May 7, 2025, with key executives.
news.headline: Canadian Utilities reported Q1 2025 adjusted earnings of $232 million ($0.85/share), $7 million higher than 2024. $401M was invested in capital expenditures, with 91% in regulated utilities such as ATCO Energy Systems and ATCO Australia. The company declared a Q2 dividend of 45.77 cents per share. Total assets amount to $24 billion with 9,100 employees.
Oneida Energy Storage Project, Canada’s largest battery facility, commences operations ahead of schedule and under budget.
